# Letters2NumbersConverter.com

> A free, browser-based collection of 100+ cipher, encoding, decoding, and conversion tools. No sign-up required. All processing happens client-side ‚Äî no data is sent to any server.

## About This Site

Letters2NumbersConverter.com is a multi-tool web application built with Next.js and hosted on Vercel. It provides free online tools for cryptography, classical ciphers, character encoding, audio analysis, image processing, puzzle solving, and text conversion. The site targets developers, students, CTF competitors, escape room enthusiasts, and cryptography learners.

## Site Structure

- `/` ‚Äî Homepage with featured tools and interactive Morse code section
- `/tools` ‚Äî Full directory of all 100+ tools
- `/blog` ‚Äî Educational articles on ciphers, encoding, and puzzle-solving
- `/play` ‚Äî Interactive games (cryptogram game, escape room)
- `/faq` ‚Äî Frequently asked questions
- `/about` ‚Äî About the site
- `/contact` ‚Äî Contact form
- `/sitemap` ‚Äî Full site navigation
- `/privacy-policy`, `/terms-of-service`, `/cookie-policy`, `/disclaimer` ‚Äî Legal pages

## Tools ‚Äî Cipher & Classical Cryptography

- `/tools/a1z26-translator` ‚Äî A1Z26: A=1, B=2 ‚Ä¶ Z=26 encoder/decoder
- `/tools/a1z26-decoder-and-encoder` ‚Äî Bidirectional A1Z26 converter
- `/tools/a0z25-cipher-translator` ‚Äî A0Z25: A=0, B=1 ‚Ä¶ Z=25 encoder
- `/tools/a0z25-decoder` ‚Äî A0Z25 decoder
- `/tools/a0z25-converter` ‚Äî A0Z25 converter
- `/tools/caesar-cipher-decoder` ‚Äî Caesar cipher encoder/decoder with brute-force all-25-shifts mode
- `/tools/rot13-decoder` ‚Äî ROT13 encoder/decoder (Caesar shift 13)
- `/tools/atbash-cipher-decoder` ‚Äî Atbash mirror-alphabet cipher
- `/tools/baconian-cipher` ‚Äî Bacon's 5-bit binary cipher (A/B or 0/1)
- `/tools/playfair-cipher-solver` ‚Äî Playfair digraph substitution cipher
- `/tools/monoalphabetic-substitution-cipher` ‚Äî Custom alphabet mapping cipher
- `/tools/skip-cipher` ‚Äî Skip/rail-fence style cipher
- `/tools/skip-cipher-decoder` ‚Äî Skip cipher decoder
- `/tools/vernam-cipher-decoder` ‚Äî Vernam one-time-pad cipher
- `/tools/enigma-machine-emulator` ‚Äî WWII Enigma machine emulator
- `/tools/hexahue-cipher` ‚Äî Hexahue colour-based cipher
- `/tools/book-cipher-decoder` ‚Äî Book cipher (page/line/word references)
- `/tools/cipher-identifier` ‚Äî Identifies the cipher type from ciphertext

## Tools ‚Äî Encoding & Decoding

- `/tools/ascii-decoder` ‚Äî ASCII codes ‚Üî text (decimal, hex, binary, octal)
- `/tools/html-encoder-decoder` ‚Äî HTML entity encoder/decoder
- `/tools/online-url-decoder-encoder` ‚Äî URL encode/decode
- `/tools/url-percent-encoding-decoding` ‚Äî Percent-encoding encoder/decoder
- `/tools/base32-converter` ‚Äî Base32 encoder/decoder
- `/tools/base64-image-viewer` ‚Äî View Base64-encoded images
- `/tools/saml-encoder` ‚Äî SAML encoder/decoder (SAMLRequest deflate+Base64, SAMLResponse Base64)
- `/tools/morse-code-translator` ‚Äî Morse code translator with audio playback
- `/tools/morse-code-decoder-and-encoder` ‚Äî Morse code decoder and encoder
- `/tools/morse-code-to-base64` ‚Äî Convert Morse code to Base64
- `/tools/tapcode-translator` ‚Äî Tap code (Polybius-based prison cipher)
- `/tools/nato-phonetic-alphabet` ‚Äî NATO phonetic alphabet (Alpha, Bravo, Charlie‚Ä¶)
- `/tools/baconian-cipher` ‚Äî Baconian binary cipher

## Tools ‚Äî Number Systems & Converters

- `/tools/letter-number-converter` ‚Äî Letters ‚Üî numbers (A1Z26)
- `/tools/numbers-to-letters` ‚Äî Numbers to letters converter
- `/tools/word-to-number-translator` ‚Äî Words to numbers
- `/tools/alphanumeric-conversion-tool` ‚Äî Multi-format alphanumeric converter
- `/tools/ivr-alphanumeric-conversion-tool` ‚Äî IVR phone keypad alphanumeric conversion
- `/tools/decimal-to-hexadecimal-converter-online` ‚Äî Decimal to hex converter
- `/tools/text-to-roman-numerals` ‚Äî Text/numbers to Roman numerals
- `/tools/babylonian-numeral-converter` ‚Äî Decimal ‚Üî Babylonian base-60 numerals
- `/tools/egyptian-numbers-converter` ‚Äî Decimal ‚Üî Egyptian hieroglyphic numerals
- `/tools/mayan-numeral-converter` ‚Äî Decimal ‚Üî Mayan numerals
- `/tools/cistercian-numerals-converter` ‚Äî Decimal ‚Üî Cistercian medieval numerals
- `/tools/medicare-prefix-converter` ‚Äî Medicare prefix decoder
- `/tools/medicare-id-converter` ‚Äî Medicare ID converter
- `/tools/mbi-converter` ‚Äî Medicare Beneficiary Identifier converter

## Tools ‚Äî Text & String Processing

- `/tools/anagram-solver` ‚Äî Anagram solver and word finder
- `/tools/reverse-text-converter` ‚Äî Reverse text/words/lines
- `/tools/camel-case-converter` ‚Äî camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase converter
- `/tools/sentence-unscrambler` ‚Äî Unscramble jumbled sentences
- `/tools/longest-word-using-these-letters-solver` ‚Äî Find longest word from a set of letters
- `/tools/text-frequency-analysis` ‚Äî Letter/word frequency analysis
- `/tools/online-random-string-generator` ‚Äî Random string generator
- `/tools/sims-language-translator` ‚Äî Simlish translator
- `/tools/letter-to-phone-number-converter` ‚Äî Letters to phone number digits
- `/tools/password-strength-tester` ‚Äî Password strength checker

## Tools ‚Äî Cryptogram & Puzzle Solving

- `/tools/cryptogram-solver` ‚Äî Cryptogram puzzle solver
- `/tools/cryptogram-solver-free` ‚Äî Free cryptogram solver
- `/tools/cryptogram-generator` ‚Äî Generate cryptogram puzzles
- `/tools/blossom-solver` ‚Äî Merriam-Webster Blossom word puzzle solver
- `/tools/fill-in-the-blanks-equation-solver` ‚Äî Fill-in-the-blanks equation solver
- `/tools/escape-room-builder` ‚Äî Escape room puzzle builder

## Tools ‚Äî Audio Analysis

- `/tools/audio-spectrogram` ‚Äî Audio spectrogram visualizer
- `/tools/audio-spectrogram-decoder` ‚Äî Spectrogram decoder
- `/tools/morse-code-translator` ‚Äî Morse code with audio playback
- `/tools/get-song-bpm` ‚Äî BPM (beats per minute) detector
- `/tools/tempo-tapper` ‚Äî Tap to find BPM
- `/tools/lufs-meter` ‚Äî LUFS loudness meter (broadcast standards)
- `/tools/id3-metadata-viewer` ‚Äî ID3 audio tag viewer (MP3 metadata)
- `/tools/convert-ogg-to-wav` ‚Äî OGG to WAV converter
- `/tools/playback-speed-calculator` ‚Äî Playback speed calculator

## Tools ‚Äî Image Processing

- `/tools/black-and-white-photo-to-color-converter` ‚Äî Colorize B&W photos
- `/tools/make-grayscale-image-online` ‚Äî Convert image to grayscale
- `/tools/base64-image-viewer` ‚Äî View Base64-encoded images
- `/tools/steganography-image-decoder` ‚Äî Decode hidden data in images
- `/tools/scan-words-from-image` ‚Äî OCR: extract text from images
- `/tools/placeholder-image-creator` ‚Äî Generate placeholder images
- `/tools/tcg-proxy-creator` ‚Äî Trading card game proxy image creator
- `/tools/webp-to-gif` ‚Äî WebP to GIF converter
- `/tools/cm-to-pixels-converter` ‚Äî Centimetres to pixels converter
- `/tools/px-vw-converter` ‚Äî Pixels to viewport-width converter
- `/tools/cmyk-to-pantone-color-converter` ‚Äî CMYK to Pantone converter
- `/tools/pantone-to-hex-converter` ‚Äî Pantone to hex converter
- `/tools/rgb-to-pantone-color-converter` ‚Äî RGB to Pantone converter

- `/tools/pdf-to-word-converter` ‚Äî PDF to Word (.docx) converter

- `/tools/webm-compressor` ‚Äî WebM video compressor

- `/tools/json-to-java-code-generator` ‚Äî JSON to Java class generator

- `/tools/yaml-to-ini-converter` ‚Äî YAML to INI converter

- `/tools/html-encoder-decoder` ‚Äî HTML entity encoder/decoder
- `/tools/certificate-decoder` ‚Äî X.509 certificate / CSR decoder (PEM, DER, Base64)
- `/tools/saml-encoder` ‚Äî SAML 2.0 request/response encoder and decoder
- `/tools/exif-metadata-viewer` ‚Äî EXIF metadata viewer for images

- `/blog/cryptii-vs-letters2numbersconverter` ‚Äî Cryptii vs Letters2NumbersConverter comparison

## Technical Details

- Framework: Next.js (App Router), React 19, TypeScript
- Hosting: Vercel
- All tool processing is 100% client-side ‚Äî no text, files, or user data are sent to any server
- No account or sign-up required for any tool
- Workspace save feature: users can save and restore tool state in browser localStorage
- Supports dark mode

## Contact

Contact form: /contact
Email: mindfulmarketingad@gmail.com
